fragment.choose:
<when condition="@(
            context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("isResponsesApi", false)
            && (context.Request.Method ?? string.Empty).Equals("POST", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            && context.Response != null
            && context.Response.StatusCode >= 200
            && context.Response.StatusCode < 300
        )">
            <set-variable name="newResponseId" value="@{
                try
                {
                    var raw = context.Response.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
                    if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(raw)) { return string.Empty; }
                    var json = JObject.Parse(raw);
                    return json["id"]?.ToString() ?? string.Empty;
                }
                catch { return string.Empty; }
            }" />

            
                <when condition="@(!string.IsNullOrEmpty(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("newResponseId", string.Empty)))">
                    <cache-store-value
                        key="@("response-id-" + (string)context.Variables["newResponseId"])"
                        value="@{
                            var subId = context.Subscription?.Id ?? string.Empty;
                            var model = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("requestedModel", string.Empty);
                            var userId = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("user-id", subId);
                            return string.Concat(subId, "|", model, "|", userId);
                        }"
                        duration="86400"
                        caching-type="internal" />

                    
                        @((string)context.Variables["newResponseId"])
                    

                    
                        @($"Cached response-id ownership: id={context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("newResponseId", string.Empty)} sub={context.Subscription?.Id ?? string.Empty} model={context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("requestedModel", string.Empty)}")
